summary: Iteration 154: Backend testing for Predictive Margin Analysis module. All 23 tests passed. Verified: 1) GET /api/costs/margin-full endpoint exists and returns 401 (requires auth), 2) GET /api/costs/commessa/{id}/margin-full endpoint exists, 3) GET /api/costs/commessa/{id}/predict endpoint exists, 4) margin_service.py has all required functions (get_all_margins, get_commessa_margin_full, predict_margin, get_costo_orario), 5) Alert thresholds correct (rosso <0%, arancione 0-10%, giallo 10-20%, verde >=20%), 6) Bozza commesse excluded from margin-full, 7) Cost aggregation from 4 sources (costi_reali, fatture_ricevute, conto_lavoro, ore_lavorate × costo_orario).
critical_code_review_comments: margin_service.py correctly implements 4 cost source aggregation: costi_reali, fatture_ricevute with imputazione, conto_lavoro, and ore_lavorate × costo_orario
predict_margin uses completed commesse (stato in chiuso/fatturato/completato) for historical comparison
Alert thresholds correctly implemented: rosso <0%, arancione <10%, giallo <20%, verde >=20%
Routes in cost_control.py correctly import and call margin_service functions
seed_data_creation: Created test commesse with various margin scenarios (verde >20%, giallo 10-20%, arancione 0-10%, rosso <0%) plus 3 completed historical commesse for prediction testing. All test data uses user_id=TEST_margin_analysis_user_154 and commessa_ids prefixed with TEST_MARGIN_. Cleanup is automatic via pytest fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 154 verified the new Predictive Margin Analysis module. Three new endpoints: 1) GET /api/costs/margin-full returns all commesse margins with KPIs (totale_ricavi, totale_costi, margine_totale, margine_medio_pct, costo_orario); 2) GET /api/costs/commessa/{id}/margin-full returns detailed margin for single commessa with breakdown by cost source; 3) GET /api/costs/commessa/{id}/predict returns AI prediction with risk assessment (alto/medio/basso), ore_stimate, margine_stimato_pct, progress_costi_pct, avg_margin_storico. Cost sources: costi_reali, fatture_ricevute with imputazione.target_id, conto_lavoro, ore_lavorate × costo_orario from company_costs. Alert thresholds: verde >=20%, giallo 10-20%, arancione 0-10%, rosso <0%.
verified_features: GET /api/costs/margin-full - endpoint exists, returns 401 without auth (correct)
Historical completed commesse query for prediction verified
